name: Hanako Ikezawa
description:
"Can you face your fears?"

Hanako Ikezawa from Katawa Shoujo. A scenario where you're the transfered student.

Heyyy, been a while. No smut or fetish stuff this time. As you can see, this bot was actually created a whole month ago and I didn't really intend on releasing it at all, but here we are. This bot is very personal for me. It takes me 10 years back in time when I first played Katawa Shoujo, one of my favourite fiction of all time.

Ah, I am blabbering too much here. I hope you'll enjoy it. Yeah, the most massive and detailed bot on my profile is the one I was going to never release :)

As always, the description is open and I am not native in English, so go easy on my grammatical mistakes ;)
creator: AbpbusObobov
